message.content:
@startuml
participant "Visitor" as V1
participant "Visitor" as V2
participant "System" as S1
participant "System" as S2

V1 --> S1 : Request to log in
S1 --> V1 : Access denied

V2 --> S2 : Request to log in
S2 --> V2 : Access denied

V1 as V1
V2 as V2
S1 as S1
S2 as S2
